productDisplayName: Puma Men Puma Evo White Casual Shoes
description: These stylish Evo shoes from puma come with an attractive low-profile design and great when teamed with jeans and tees.  Upper Leather upper for durability and protection Perforations on the sides and has a mesh tongue for enhanced breathability Lace-ups for snug Fit Padded collar and tongue for greater comfort Textile lining for extra comfort Brand name printed on the tongue and cat logo behind collar Cupsole for added comfortCushioned footbed for all day comfort  Midsole EVA midsole for greater shock absorption  Outsole Non-slip rubber outsole for greater traction Pivot points on the big toe mound and heel for easy 180 degree movement Flex grooves for greater flexibility of the feet
